channel.title: feature scaling on From xiaoyu
channel.description: Recent content in feature scaling on From xiaoyu

item.title: cousera-machine_learning_week2
item.description: 这是该系列笔记的第二篇。包含：多变量线性回归、feature scaling & mean normalization、Normal equation、Octave基本操作。 多变量线性回归 假设函数： \[h_\theta(x)= \theta_0 + \theta_1x_1+\theta_2x_2+ ... +\theta_nx_n（定义x_0 =1）\\向量化： h\theta_(x) = \theta^T x（\theta, x \in R^{n+1}）\] ## 损失函数 \[J(\theta) = \frac{1}{2m}\times \sum_{i=1}^{m}(h_\theta(x^{(i)} - y^{(i)})^2\] # 梯度下降法 选择 \(\alpha\) feature scaling & mean normalization 运用Normal Equation Octave基础操作
